name: ExtensionBundle_Type
title: R5: document | message | transaction | transaction-response | batch | batch-response | history | searchset | collection | subscription-notification
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Bundle.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Bundle.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Bundle.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `Bundle.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `Bundle.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Bundle.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Bundle.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: document | message | transaction | transaction-response | batch | batch-response | history | searchset | collection | subscription-notification
element.comment:
Element `Bundle.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Bundle.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
It's possible to use a bundle for other purposes (e.g. a document can be accepted as a transaction). This is primarily defined so that there can be specific rules for some of the bundle types.

element.short: document | message | transaction | transaction-response | batch | batch-response | history | searchset | collection | subscription-notification
element.definition: Indicates the purpose of this bundle - how it is intended to be used.
element.comment: It's possible to use a bundle for other purposes (e.g. a document can be accepted as a transaction). This is primarily defined so that there can be specific rules for some of the bundle types.

binding.description: Indicates the purpose of a bundle - how it is intended to be used.
